title: ACME Position Sizing Dashboard
subtitle: Synthetic strict-mode example for sizing and risk constraints.

metadata.source_posture: Synthetic thesis, portfolio, and market-data examples
metadata.decision_context: Whether the position size should be constrained by downside loss or liquidity.

hero.headline: Size is capped by liquidity and downside-loss constraints
hero.dek: The dashboard separates the PM action from the support bundle.
hero.callout: Liquidity exit, not conviction, is the binding sizing constraint in the synthetic example.

snapshot.label: Action
snapshot.detail: Use a starter size until live liquidity and downside inputs are refreshed.

snapshot.label: Constraint
snapshot.detail: Synthetic ADV support indicates exit capacity is the tightest check.

data.label: Sizing read
data.summary: Use a starter position until liquidity, volatility, and downside support are refreshed.
data.stock_skew: Upside is plausible but exit capacity gates the size.

rows.Current read: Needs refreshed target and downside case
Most restrictive based on synthetic ADV support

cases.label: Base
cases.summary: Position works if product catalyst and retention evidence hold.

cases.label: Stress
cases.summary: Liquidity stress forces slower exit and smaller size.

events.event: Refresh market data and risk inputs
events.impact: Determines whether the starter size can be increased

items: Live NAV, limits, price, ADV, volatility, borrow, and downside inputs are required before decision-grade sizing.
Factor and portfolio exposure outputs are unavailable in this synthetic example.

sources.title: Synthetic ACME thesis summary
sources.excerpt: Thesis, target, downside, and catalyst assumptions.
